'''ngayuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sialoglycan|sialoglycan]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-y-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sialoglycan|sialoglycan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngayuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæyikith|ngæyikith]] || [[word:ngæyikij|ngæyikij]] || [[word:ngæyikish|ngæyikish]] || [[word:ngæyiki|ngæyiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngayuyukuth|ngayuyukuth]] || [[word:ngayuyukuj|ngayuyukuj]] || [[word:ngayuyukush|ngayuyukush]] || [[word:ngayuyuku|ngayuyuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngayukuth|ngayukuth]] || [[word:ngayukuj|ngayukuj]] || [[word:ngayukush|ngayukush]] || [[word:ngayuku|ngayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngayufkufth|ngayufkufth]] || [[word:ngayufkufj|ngayufkufj]] || [[word:ngayufkufsh|ngayufkufsh]] || [[word:ngayufkuf|ngayufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngayukuthu|ngayukuthu]] || [[word:ngayukuju|ngayukuju]] || [[word:ngayukushu|ngayukushu]] || [[word:ngayukuku|ngayukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngayukuth|ngayukuth]] || [[word:ngayukuj|ngayukuj]] || [[word:ngayukush|ngayukush]] || [[word:ngayuku|ngayuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngayukuthul|ngayukuthul]] || [[word:ngayukujul|ngayukujul]] || [[word:ngayukushul|ngayukushul]] || [[word:ngayukukul|ngayukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngayukuuthuthu|ngayukuuthuthu]] || [[word:ngayukuujuju|ngayukuujuju]] || [[word:ngayukuushushu|ngayukuushushu]] || [[word:ngayukuuku|ngayukuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngayukuthun|ngayukuthun]] || [[word:ngayukujun|ngayukujun]] || [[word:ngayukushun|ngayukushun]] || [[word:ngayukukun|ngayukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngayukuthuoro|ngayukuthuoro]] || [[word:ngayukujuoro|ngayukujuoro]] || [[word:ngayukushuoro|ngayukushuoro]] || [[word:ngayukukuoro|ngayukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
